zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton於大約1208年出生在英國斯塔福爾蓋頓時，他的父親Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton19歲，母親Mrs Devid Nurkic20歲。他於大約1243年與Lucia Say在英國英格蘭德比夏爾格拉頓結婚。他們至少是9個女兒的父母。他去世於從1262年1月8日到1263年1月7日在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton于大约1208年出生在英国斯塔福爾蓋頓时，他的父亲Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton19岁，母亲Mrs Devid Nurkic20岁。他于大约1243年与Lucia Say在英国英格兰德比夏爾格拉頓结婚。他们至少是9个女儿的父母。他去世于从1262年1月8日到1263年1月7日在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton was born about 1208, in Gayton, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton, was 19 and his mother, Mrs Devid Nurkic, was 20. He married Lucia Say about 1243, in Gratton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 daughters. He died from 8 January 1262 to 7 January 1263, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton est né environ 1208, à Gayton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs Devid Nurkic, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lucia Say environ 1243, à Gratton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 filles. Il est décédé du 8 janvier 1262 au 7 janvier 1263, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton um 1208 in Gayton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton 19 und seine Mutter Mrs Devid Nurkic 20. Er hat um 1243 in Gratton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Lucia Say geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Töchter. Er starb von 8. Januar 1262 bis 7. Januar 1263 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton è nato il circa 1208 nel Gayton, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Devid Nurkic, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lucia Say circa 1243, nel Gratton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figlie. Morì da 8 gennaio 1262 a 7 gennaio 1263, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Meverel Lord of Gaytonが約1208年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアガイトンで生まれた時，父Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gaytonは19歳，母Mrs Devid Nurkicは20歳であった。約1243年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアグラットオンでLucia Sayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の娘の親であった。彼はから1262年1月8日まで1263年1月7日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 스태퍼드실르 게이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Devid Nurkic(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 그래턴에서 Lucia Say(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1262년 1월 8일부터 1263년 1월 7일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Gayton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Devid Nurkic, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia Say aproximadamente 1243, em Gratton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhas. Ele faleceu de 8 de janeiro de 1262 a 7 de janeiro de 1263, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Meverel Lord of Gayton родился около 1208 г. в местности геитон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Keepsman Clanser Young Devid Nurkic Premium Of Gayton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Devid Nurkic, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia Say около 1243 г. в местности граттон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 дочерей. Он умер с 8 января 1262 по 7 января 1263 в его родном городе.

Se casó con Lucia Say aproximadamente 1243, en Gratton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijas. Murió desde 8 de enero de 1262 hasta 7 de enero de 1263, en su pueblo.
